actionability_contract.actionable_now_reason: runtime_state_only; requires fresh signal, live facts, candidate/auth, action-time execution gates, official submission path, protection, account, and exchange facts

rows.actionable_now_reason: runtime_state_only; requires fresh signal, live facts, candidate/auth, action-time execution gates, official submission path, protection, account, and exchange facts
rows.authority_boundary: Registry row is strategy asset governance only. It does not authorize runtime start, candidate creation, FinalGate, Operation Layer, exchange write, real order, live-profile mutation, order-sizing mutation, withdrawal, transfer, or credential mutation.
rows.downshift_rule: Downshift if momentum exhaustion, concentration, stale facts, or protection/account conflicts appear.
rows.edge_thesis: Capture clean momentum continuation after member and group-pool confirmation.
hard_blocks: conflicting active position or open order
out-of-scope StrategyGroup, symbol, side, profile, notional, or leverage
rows.kill_condition: Kill if live/replay outcomes show persistent false continuation after costs and protection.
rows.park_rule: Park only after repeated no-edge reviews or Owner selects a different live lane.
rows.promotion_gate: Already current first live-trial lane; live action still depends on runtime state only.
rows.regime_fit: Directional crypto momentum with clean 1h persistence and acceptable liquidity.

required_facts_summary.account_exchange: balance, position, open orders, symbol availability, min notional, step, tick, leverage limit
required_facts_summary.market: latest price, recent 1h candles, closed candle timestamp, volume, mark, funding
required_facts_summary.risk: fill gap, slippage, protection plan, exit plan
required_facts_summary.strategy: member signal, group-pool selection, persistence, exhaustion disable, body extension, concentration

rows.required_next_evidence: first allocated-subaccount live outcome when fresh signal and official runtime chain pass

items: L4 tier still is not direct submit authority
fee, funding, fill-gap slippage, and min-size friction
missing protection, stale account facts, open-order or active-position conflict
closed-candle and member-state freshness remain action-time runtime facts
false breakout
fast reversal
choppy no-trade regime

rows.trade_logic: Long-only continuation lane with exhaustion and concentration disables, protected by stop/exit plan.

rows.actionable_now_reason: runtime_state_only; requires fresh signal, live facts, candidate/auth, action-time execution gates, official submission path, protection, account, and exchange facts
rows.authority_boundary: Registry row is strategy asset governance only. It does not authorize runtime start, candidate creation, FinalGate, Operation Layer, exchange write, real order, live-profile mutation, order-sizing mutation, withdrawal, transfer, or credential mutation.
rows.downshift_rule: Downshift if product eligibility, breadth, or session gap facts are unavailable.

hard_blocks: conflicting active position or open order
out-of-scope StrategyGroup, symbol, side, profile, notional, or leverage
rows.kill_condition: Kill if repeated review shows theme bursts fail after session and cost friction.

rows.regime_fit: Theme momentum where product/session and concentration risks are acceptable.

rows.actionable_now_reason: runtime_state_only; requires fresh signal, live facts, candidate/auth, action-time execution gates, official submission path, protection, account, and exchange facts
rows.authority_boundary: Registry row is strategy asset governance only. It does not authorize runtime start, candidate creation, FinalGate, Operation Layer, exchange write, real order, live-profile mutation, order-sizing mutation, withdrawal, transfer, or credential mutation.
rows.downshift_rule: Downshift if derivatives facts are stale or settlement timing invalidates the setup.
rows.edge_thesis: Capture funding, basis, and crowding stress where derivatives pressure creates asymmetric continuation or unwind.

out-of-scope StrategyGroup, symbol, side, profile, notional, or leverage
rows.kill_condition: Kill if stress signals repeatedly fail after funding, basis, and liquidation costs.

rows.actionable_now_reason: runtime_state_only; requires fresh signal, live facts, candidate/auth, action-time execution gates, official submission path, protection, account, and exchange facts
